name: redmine-fastmcp-server-with-oauth
description: A centrally-deployed MCP server for Redmine with OAuth 2.0 authentication. An administrator deploys it once; users connect by authorizing through Redmine — no API keys or per-user setup required. Built with FastMCP 3.
